title: Joey Barton Arrested After Fight
summary: Joey Barton, a former football player, was arrested after a fight near a golf club. It happened on Sunday night in Fairway, Merseyside. Police found a man with injuries to his face and ribs. Two men, including Barton, were arrested for hurting someone. The injured man went to the hospital. Barton used to play for teams like Manchester City and Newcastle. He stopped playing in 2017 and became a manager. This news is from the BBC, a trusted source.

background_read: Joey Barton is a former professional footballer from England who played for teams like Manchester City and Newcastle United. He retired in 2017 and started working as a football manager. The BBC is a news organization in the UK that reports on events like this. In this story, he was involved in an incident where someone got hurt, and the police arrested him to investigate what happened.
Article_Structure: WHO: Joey Barton, a former football player, and another man
WHAT: They were arrested after a fight where a man was hurt
WHERE: Near a golf club in Fairway, Merseyside
WHY: Because the police think they might have caused injuries to someone

perspectives.description: The police are investigating to see if laws were broken and if Barton should be charged.
